title: Word Formation: The Road to Victory

tasks.instruction: Przeczytaj ponizszy tekst. Uzupelnij kazda luke (1.1-1.8), przeksztalcajac wyraz podany w ramce w taka forme, ktora logicznie i gramatycznie pasuje do kontekstu. Wymagana jest calkowita poprawnosc gramatyczna i ortograficzna wpisywanych wyrazow. Dwa wyrazy zostaly podane dodatkowo i nie pasuja do zadnej luki.
tasks.text: The path to sporting greatness demands 1.1. _________ (1.1) dedication and sacrifice. Athletes often push themselves through 1.2. _________ (1.2) training sessions that test the limits of human 1.3. _________ (1.3). The greatest 1.4. _________ (1.4) in sport come not from raw talent alone but from years of disciplined preparation. During major tournaments, the 1.5. _________ (1.5) rounds can be particularly nerve-wracking for competitors and fans alike. A single defeat can be deeply 1.6. _________ (1.6), yet true champions show remarkable 1.7. _________ (1.7) in bouncing back from setbacks. What makes sport truly captivating is its 1.8. _________ (1.8) nature, where the outcome is never certain until the final whistle.
